title: sticherus pteridellus
intro: Sticherus pteridellus, also known as the Australian tree fern or Queensland tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sticherus pteridellus are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and processing the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
